commands.review_summary:
The PR registers `google-vertex` for Google image and video generation and adds Vertex-specific image/video REST routing, auth headers, and response parsing.

PR surface: Source +199, Tests +17. Total +216 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current source and v2026.6.1 show `google-vertex` missing from image/video generation contracts, and the PR body includes after-fix CLI proof; I did not run live GCP credentials in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - The remaining blockers are narrow file-level repairs in the Google video provider with clear regression-test targets.
